name: morpheus
description: Morpheus is a research platform from North Star Systems Security Lab (NS3L).

scripts.setup: pnpm install && pnpm run build && pnpm run install:bin
scripts.build: pnpm run build:apps && pnpm run build:js-tools
scripts.build:apps: pnpm --filter @morpheus/app build && pnpm --filter @morpheus/docs build && pnpm --filter @morpheus/runs-viewer build
scripts.build:js-tools: pnpm --filter @morpheus/buildroot build && pnpm --filter @morpheus/microkit-sdk build && pnpm --filter @morpheus/qemu build && pnpm --filter @morpheus/nvirsh build && pnpm --filter @morpheus/sel4 build && pnpm --filter @morpheus/libvmm build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @morpheus/app test && pnpm --filter @morpheus/docs test && pnpm --filter @morpheus/runs-viewer test && pnpm --filter @morpheus/buildroot test && pnpm --filter @morpheus/microkit-sdk test && pnpm --filter @morpheus/qemu test && pnpm --filter @morpheus/nvirsh test && pnpm --filter @morpheus/sel4 test && pnpm --filter @morpheus/libvmm test
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @morpheus/app lint && pnpm --filter @morpheus/docs lint && pnpm --filter @morpheus/runs-viewer lint && pnpm --filter @morpheus/buildroot lint && pnpm --filter @morpheus/microkit-sdk lint && pnpm --filter @morpheus/qemu lint && pnpm --filter @morpheus/nvirsh lint && pnpm --filter @morpheus/sel4 lint && pnpm --filter @morpheus/libvmm lint
